name: proton-drive-cli-mcp
description: Use Proton Drive from MCP clients through the official Proton Drive CLI.
long_description: A local MCP server that exposes Proton Drive file, folder, sharing, and invitation workflows while delegating authentication and encrypted Drive behavior to the official Proton Drive CLI. It does not collect Proton credentials.

tools.name: proton_drive_auth_status
tools.description: Check whether the Proton Drive CLI can access the logged-in account.

tools.name: proton_drive_auth_login
tools.description: Start the official Proton Drive CLI browser login flow in the background.

tools.name: proton_drive_auth_login_status
tools.description: Inspect the background Proton Drive CLI login process.

tools.name: proton_drive_auth_login_cancel
tools.description: Cancel the background Proton Drive CLI login process.

tools.name: proton_drive_auth_logout
tools.description: Log out the official Proton Drive CLI from the current OS user.

tools.name: proton_drive_cli_install
tools.description: Install or update the official Proton Drive CLI for this system.

tools.name: proton_drive_cli_version
tools.description: Show the Proton Drive CLI and SDK versions.

tools.name: proton_drive_cli_help
tools.description: Show help for the root CLI or a supported command.

tools.name: proton_drive_list
tools.description: List children under a Proton Drive path.

tools.name: proton_drive_info
tools.description: Get metadata for a Proton Drive file or folder.

tools.name: proton_drive_create_folder
tools.description: Create a folder under a Proton Drive parent path.

tools.name: proton_drive_upload
tools.description: Upload one or more local files or folders.

tools.name: proton_drive_download
tools.description: Download one or more Proton Drive paths.

tools.name: proton_drive_rename
tools.description: Rename a Proton Drive file or folder.

tools.name: proton_drive_copy
tools.description: Copy one or more Proton Drive nodes.

tools.name: proton_drive_move
tools.description: Move one or more Proton Drive nodes.

tools.name: proton_drive_trash
tools.description: Move Proton Drive files or folders to trash.

tools.name: proton_drive_restore
tools.description: Restore Proton Drive files or folders from trash.

tools.name: proton_drive_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete Proton Drive files or folders.

tools.name: proton_drive_empty_trash
tools.description: Permanently delete everything in Proton Drive trash.

tools.name: proton_drive_sharing_status
tools.description: Show sharing status for a Proton Drive path.

tools.name: proton_drive_sharing_invite
tools.description: Invite Proton users to a shared path.

tools.name: proton_drive_sharing_remove
tools.description: Remove user access entries.

tools.name: proton_drive_sharing_set_url
tools.description: Create or update a public sharing URL without passing custom link passwords through command-line arguments.

tools.name: proton_drive_sharing_remove_url
tools.description: Remove a public sharing URL.

tools.name: proton_drive_invitation_list
tools.description: List pending Proton Drive invitations.

tools.name: proton_drive_invitation_accept
tools.description: Accept a Proton Drive invitation by UID.

tools.name: proton_drive_invitation_reject
tools.description: Reject a Proton Drive invitation by UID.
